children.heading: Previous contractual obligations; tax exemption
children.label: a Previous contractual obligations; tax exemption
children.text: Funds distributed under sections 117a to 117c of this title shall not be liable for the payment of previously contracted obligations except as may be provided by the governing body of the tribe and distributions of such funds shall be subject to the provisions of (), as amended [].section 7 of the Act of October 19, 197387 Stat. 46625 U.S.C. 1407

children.heading: Funds appropriated in satisfaction of judgments
children.label: b Funds appropriated in satisfaction of judgments
children.text: Nothing in sections 117a to 117c of this title shall affect the requirements of the Act of (), as amended [ et seq.], or of any plan approved thereunder, with respect to the use or distribution of funds subject to that Act: , That per capita payments made pursuant to a plan approved under that Act may be made by an Indian tribe as provided in if all other provisions of the 1973 Act are met, including but not limited to, the protection of the interests of minors and incompetents in such funds.October 19, 197387 Stat. 46625 U.S.C. 1401section 117a of this titleProvided

children.heading: Shoshone Tribe and Arapaho Tribe of the Wind River Reservation, Wyoming
children.label: c Shoshone Tribe and Arapaho Tribe of the Wind River Reservation, Wyoming
children.text: Nothing in sections 117a to 117c of this title, except the provisions of subsection (a) of this section, shall apply to the Shoshone Tribe and the Arapahoe Tribe of the Wind River Reservation, Wyoming.1So in original. Probably should be “Arapaho”.1
